overallInterpretation: The screenshot shows a 3D scene on a dark navy background containing three visible objects: a yellow sphere (sun), a blue cube (ship), and a dark green quad (the RenderQuad / TV) floating above and behind them. The green quad displays a top-down orthographic view of the same scene, with a small yellow dot (sun) and a small blue square (ship) visible on its green surface. This matches the expected description: the main perspective camera renders the sun, ship, and a TV quad that shows a live feed from a secondary orthographic camera looking down at the same objects.

artifacts.interpretation: The image shows a dark navy/blue 3D scene. In the lower-center area, a yellow sphere (sun) and a blue cube (ship) are rendered from a perspective camera. Above them, a dark green quadrilateral (the RenderQuad acting as a TV screen) is visible, rendered at an angle in perspective. On the green quad's surface, two small objects are discernible: a tiny yellow dot representing the sun and a tiny blue square representing the ship, both seen from a top-down orthographic viewpoint. The green background of the quad confirms it is rendering from a separate camera with its own clear color. All expected elements are present and correctly composed.
